name: I Putu Wirya
quote: EduSchool telah memberikan pendidikan terbaik untuk anak saya. Pendekatan holistiknya membuat anak saya tumbuh percaya diri dan berprestasi.
quoteEn: EduSchool has provided the best education for my child. The holistic approach has helped my child grow confident and accomplished.

name: Ni Made Saraswati
quote: Berkat bimbingan guru-guru EduSchool, saya berhasil diterima di universitas impian saya di luar negeri. Terima kasih EduSchool!
quoteEn: Thanks to the guidance of EduSchool teachers, I got accepted into my dream university abroad. Thank you EduSchool!

name: Komang Ayu Pratiwi
quote: Belajar di EduSchool sangat menyenangkan! Banyak kegiatan seru dan guru-gurunya sangat mendukung bakat kami.
quoteEn: Studying at EduSchool is so much fun! Lots of exciting activities and the teachers are very supportive of our talents.

name: Dr. I Gede Suardana
quote: EduSchool konsisten menjaga kualitas pendidikan dan transparansi dalam pengelolaan sekolah. Kami sangat mengapresiasi hal ini.
quoteEn: EduSchool consistently maintains educational quality and transparency in school management. We greatly appreciate this.
